title: Crispy Turkish Chicken Skewers
description: Fatty yet light, these double-fried chicken skewers are brushed in white wine vinegar and seasoned with smoked paprika, cumin, and oregano, perfect for a romantic Middle Eastern dinner.
instructions: Marinate chicken cubes in olive oil, white wine vinegar, smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and honey; cover and refrigerate 30 minutes.
Thread marinated chicken onto soaked wooden skewers, spacing evenly.
Heat oil in a deep pan to 170 C and preheat a second pan to 190 C for double-frying.
Fry skewers for 3 minutes until golden, then remove and drain on paper towels.
Increase temperature to 190 C and fry again for 2 minutes to achieve extra crispness.
Remove skewers, let rest 2 minutes, then sprinkle with additional salt if desired.
Serve hot with a side of fresh cucumber salad or yogurt dip.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 2 days.
